messages.subject: [R-sig-teaching] Passion-Driven Statistics: Project Based Teaching Techniques - livestream seminar
messages.subject_clean: Passion-Driven Statistics: Project Based Teaching Techniques - livestream seminar
messages.body_plain:
Hi everyone

Instats is offering a two-day workshop on Passion-Driven Statistics:
Project Based Teaching Techniques
<https://instats.org/seminar/passion-driven-statistics-project-based2>,
running August 15 - 16, by professors Lisa Dierker and Kristin Flaming.
Revolutionize the way you teach statistics with Passion-Driven Statistics,
an NSF funded statistics curriculum designed to maximally engage your
students and others. This workshop will empower you to: Craft engaging
lessons that spark curiosity and exploration; Guide students on real-world
research projects using large, real-world datasets; ?Become a more
effective educator through interactive sessions and networking with peers.
Don't just teach statistics, ignite a passion for discovery with this 2-day
workshop.

Note that while many examples are given in SAS, the course formally
supports a variety of software packages/languages, including R.

Sign up today
<https://instats.org/seminar/passion-driven-statistics-project-based2> to
secure your space in this novel workshop, and please feel free to tell your
friends and colleagues.


Best wishes

Michael Zyphur
Director
Institute for Statistical and Data Science
*instats.org* <http://instats.org>
<http://instats.org>

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
